summary: The diff implements the vast majority of the 14 requirements. Most new components are present and correctly structured. A few notable gaps exist: the backend uses a plain var (not stable) for message storage (REQ-11), the footer copyright year is partially dynamic rather than fixed to '2026', the Real Estate project is categorized under 'Automation' instead of a real-estate-relevant tab, and the Live Data Feed uses an updating table rather than a continuously looping marquee/ticker animation.

missing_requirements.requirement: Backend stores submitted data in a stable array across upgrades
missing_requirements.reason: backend/main.mo declares 'var messages : [ContactMessage] = []' without the 'stable' keyword, meaning messages will not persist across canister upgrades as required.

missing_requirements.requirement: Rows animate in continuously (looped) as a marquee/ticker strip
missing_requirements.reason: LiveDataFeed.tsx implements a static table with record counts updating via setInterval, not a continuously looping marquee/ticker where rows stream in. The spec explicitly calls for rows that animate in continuously in a loop.
HeroSection.tsx is truncated in the diff; it cannot be confirmed that the hero ticker distinct from the LiveDataFeed section is still present and functional.

hallucinated_features.description: backend/migration.mo module with a run() function returning empty messages
hallucinated_features.reason: The build request constrains the backend to a single Motoko actor in backend/main.mo. A separate migration.mo file was not requested.

hallucinated_features.description: DataScopeEstimator includes 'Daily' as a frequency option and 'Real Estate' and 'Job Boards' as website types
hallucinated_features.reason: REQ-5 specifies exactly frequency options 'One-time / Weekly / Monthly' and website types 'E-commerce, Directory, Social, News, Custom'. Additional options were added beyond the spec.

hallucinated_features.description: DataScopeEstimator displays an estimated price in addition to delivery time and complexity badge
hallucinated_features.reason: REQ-5 only requests an estimated delivery timeline and complexity badge. The price estimate display was not requested.

hallucinated_features.description: ProfileCard includes a stats row showing 60+ Projects, 2.4M+ Records, 7+ Industries
hallucinated_features.reason: REQ-4 specifies the profile card contents as initials avatar, animated gold ring, name, title, founding badge, platform badges row, and 99.2% accuracy deco card. A stats row was not part of the specification.

hallucinated_features.description: Footer copyright year dynamically appends the current year using new Date().getFullYear() instead of the fixed '2026'
hallucinated_features.reason: REQ-13 specifies the copyright line must read exactly '© 2023–2026 DataNex Research Solutions · Jay Gohil · All Rights Reserved'. A dynamic year deviates from the fixed spec.

hallucinated_features.description: backend/main.mo includes a validateMessage function with restrictive email validation requiring a '.com' suffix
hallucinated_features.reason: REQ-11 only requires storing submitted messages in a stable array and exposing getMessages. Server-side email validation logic was not requested and would reject valid non-.com emails.
